subject: Geography
title: Jakarta: The Sinking Capital
description: One-minute skill: Jakarta: The Sinking Capital.

hook.text: Jakarta is sinking so fast that Indonesia is moving its capital to a different island.

buildup.text: Parts of North Jakarta have sunk 4 meters in 30 years due to groundwater pumping.

discovery.text: 11 million people live in areas below sea level, protected by crumbling sea walls.

twist.text: The new capital, Nusantara, is being built from scratch in Borneo's jungle.

climax.text: Jakarta may be the first megacity abandoned because of its own geography.

punchline.text: When your capital sinks, you build a new one.

quiz.question: Why is Indonesia moving its capital from Jakarta?
options: Jakarta is rapidly sinking below sea level
A volcano destroyed the city center
